cards.name: Lloyd
cards.description: The legendary Green Ninja, master of Energy and leader of the ninja team after the Merge.

cards.name: Kai
cards.description: Hot-headed master of fire whose fiery spirit is matched only by his blazing fists.

cards.name: Nya
cards.description: Master of water, reunited with Kai. Calm as the ocean — until she strikes.

cards.name: Arin
cards.description: A huge fan of the Ninja who discovered his own powers. Brave, loyal and still growing.

cards.name: Sora
cards.description: A technopath from Imperium who can interface with machines. Brains over brawn.

cards.name: Wyldfyre
cards.description: Raised by dragons in the wild. Fierce, untamed and speaks dragon better than people.

cards.name: Riyu
cards.description: An adorable but powerful young dragon bonded to the ninja team.

cards.name: Frak
cards.description: A big-hearted Serpentine and master of Quake. Slow but hits like an earthquake.

cards.name: Master Wu
cards.description: The ancient teacher whose wisdom surpasses almost everyone — and whose staff hits even harder.

cards.name: P.I.X.A.L.
cards.description: Part Nindroid, all ninja. Her analytical mind and combat systems make her formidable.

cards.name: Egalt
cards.description: Elder Dragon Master who teaches the Rising Dragon technique. Stoic, powerful and wise.

cards.name: Rontu
cards.description: Rontu trains alongside Egalt on the Dragon Masters' plateau.

cards.name: Arc Dragon of Focus
cards.description: Summoned in two halves by the ninja to defeat Thunderfang. When united, its power is near-unstoppable.

cards.name: Cole
cards.description: The steadfast master of Earth. Cole's strength and reliability are the bedrock of the ninja team.

cards.name: Jay
cards.description: The fast-talking master of Lightning, working as a bounty hunter after the Merge before rejoining the ninja.

cards.name: Roby
cards.description: Games Master of the Tournament of Sources and Wyldfyre's boyfriend. Helped expose his uncle Bleckt's cheating.

cards.name: Empress Beatrix
cards.description: Tyrannical ruler of Imperium who drains dragons of their life force to power her kingdom.

cards.name: Lord Ras
cards.description: The dark master of Shatterspin who leads the Shadow Dojo against the ninja.

cards.name: Cinder
cards.description: Wolf Clan's deadliest fighter and Shatterspin master. Broke Wyldfyre's leg without breaking a sweat.

cards.name: Rapton
cards.description: Commander of the Claws of Imperium. Relentless dragon hunter who follows orders without mercy.

cards.name: Jordana
cards.description: Scientist and spy who extracted Source Dragon energy for Beatrix. Was possessed by Rox during the Blood Moon ritual.

cards.name: Nokt
cards.description: Master of darkness in the Forbidden Five. Moves like nightfall — unseen until too late.

cards.name: Rox
cards.description: The brute of the Forbidden Five. Immovable as rock and just as likely to crush you flat.

cards.name: Zarkt
cards.description: Electric and unpredictable. Zarkt brings crackling chaos to every battle.

cards.name: Drix
cards.description: A corrosive menace. Drix's powers eat through armour, shields and ninja confidence alike.

cards.name: Kur
cards.description: Master of the void — a terrifying absence of everything, including mercy.

cards.name: Dr. LaRow
cards.description: The brilliant and cruel scientist behind Imperium's dragon-draining technology.

cards.name: Dorama
cards.description: A deranged former showman who built dragon-draining tech for Imperium. Fights with fireworks, giant puppets and an unshakeable flair for the dramatic.

cards.name: Bleckt
cards.description: Roby's treacherous uncle and former Minister of Ledgering. Rigged the Tournament of Sources for Ras — until Wyldfyre and Zur brought him down.

cards.name: Thunderfang
cards.description: A monstrous storm dragon. Thunder rolls wherever Thunderfang flies.

cards.name: Zeatrix
cards.description: Twin sister of Empress Beatrix. She commands devastating shockwaves with cold precision.

cards.name: Wolf Mask Warrior
cards.description: Ras's wolf-masked footsoldiers. Individually beatable — but they never come alone.

cards.name: Arrakore
cards.description: A powerful Djinn who teleports several ninja to Djinjago. His wish magic is as unpredictable as it is potent.

cards.name: Geo
cards.description: A Munce-Geckle hybrid and member of the Finders. Rejected by both tribes, he found his place fighting alongside the ninja.

cards.name: Heatwave
cards.description: The dragon who raised Wyldfyre from infancy. Captured by Imperium and freed by Lloyd — their bond runs deeper than blood.

cards.name: Gandalaria
cards.description: Ancient sorceress of Mysterium. Created Bonzle to imprison the Forbidden Five.

cards.name: Zane
cards.description: The titanium Nindroid ninja. Cold precision and perfect logic wrapped in gleaming armour.

cards.name: Lord Garmadon
cards.description: Lloyd's fearsome father and master of destruction. Four arms, zero mercy — and a complicated relationship with his son.

cards.name: Claw of Imperium
cards.description: The elite soldiers of Empress Beatrix, deployed to hunt and capture dragons across the Merged Realms.

cards.name: Koko
cards.description: Lloyd's mother and a formidable warrior in her own right. She walked away from darkness — but never lost her edge.

cards.name: Tox
cards.description: A veteran Elemental Master of Poison who competed in both the Tournament of Elements and Tournament of Sources. Quietly dangerous.

cards.name: Mr. Pale
cards.description: The elusive Elemental Master of Light. His blinding power dazzles opponents before they even know the fight has started.

cards.name: Bonzle
cards.description: A mysterious living spell created by Gandalaria, capable of sealing the Forbidden Five. Small but extraordinarily powerful in the right hands.

cards.name: Zanth
cards.description: Sora's loyal dragon companion and one of Djinjago's last survivors. Can shift from pocket-sized to enormous — and flies fast enough to turn purple.

cards.name: Jiro
cards.description: The fastest dragon in the ninja's stable. Bonded with Nya, upgraded by Sora. Strikes with electrokinetic breath and shields allies with his wings.

cards.name: Euphrasia
cards.description: Cloud Kingdom's quiet protector. Hid her Wind powers until the kingdom needed her most — now one of Lloyd's students.

cards.name: Lobbo
cards.description: Loveable robot and Crossroads legend. Won the Mech Master 5000 by accident — and runs Lobbo's Totally Rad Arcade. Lobbo Lobbo.

cards.name: Kreel
cards.description: Scheming mech racer and Crossroads junkyard owner. Runs the Whack Rats and a podcast. Always working an angle.

cards.name: Arc Dragon of Life
cards.description: Ancient guardian of the Whispering Wood who reveals Lloyd's true destiny. Wise, powerful and deeply connected to the Life element.

cards.name: Earth Monster
cards.description: A corrupted being born from elemental imbalance. Pure destructive force — slow, merciless and almost impossible to stop.

cards.name: Mutation Monster
cards.description: Grotesque creature of corrupted Life energy. Unpredictable and disturbing rather than powerful. Fought by Nya.

cards.name: Ice Monster
cards.description: Hard, cold and relentless. A corrupted Ice elemental being with no cunning — just frozen, unstoppable force.

cards.name: Acid Monster
cards.description: Fluid and corrosive. Faster than the Earth Monster but equally mindless — a corrupted Water elemental unleashed on the Merged Realms.

cards.name: Fire Monster
cards.description: A blazing force of corrupted Fire energy. Second only to the Earth Monster in raw destructive power.
